item.name: Wind-up Moenbryda
item.description:
Destined to die a hero...and live on as a mechanized servitor.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Moenbryda minion.
item.tooltip:
I shall allow no foe to harm
the lovely Moenbryda.
   - Thancred
item.specialactiondescription: Reduces HP of closest enemy Gate by 50%. No effect if Gate is already inoperable.

obj.n: An Ending to Mark a New Beginning
